summary: ID-System Tests Complete - All backend tests passed (13/13). Frontend verified: Wareneingang workflow shows correct next Asset-ID (TSRID-TAB-i7-0004), ID history endpoint working, gap-filling logic working.
critical_code_review_comments: ID system correctly calculates next available ID by checking existing assets (fills gaps)
No counter collection used - IDs are calculated dynamically from existing warehouse_asset_id values
ID history is logged in asset_id_history collection with full audit trail (created, deleted, reassigned)
Delete endpoint correctly frees ID and logs to history for reuse
Frontend correctly displays next Asset-ID preview in Wareneingang workflow
seed_data_creation: Test assets created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: ID system is fully functional. Backend API endpoints tested: GET /api/asset-mgmt/asset-id-config/next-id (returns next available ID with gap filling), POST /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/intake-with-auto-id (creates asset with auto ID and history), DELETE /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/unassigned/{sn} (deletes asset, frees ID, logs history), GET /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/id-history/{warehouse_asset_id} (returns full ID history). Frontend Wareneingang tab shows correct next ID and unassigned count.

id_gap_filling.details: get_next_available_warehouse_sequence() correctly finds first available gap in sequence

id_history.details: GET /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/id-history/{id} returns full audit trail with events (created, deleted)

intake_with_auto_id.details: POST /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/intake-with-auto-id creates asset with warehouse_asset_id and logs history

delete_frees_id.details: DELETE /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/unassigned/{sn} correctly frees ID for reuse and logs to history

frontend_next_id_display.details: Wareneingang workflow shows 'Nächste Asset-ID (Lager): TSRID-TAB-i7-0004' correctly

GET /api/asset-mgmt/asset-id-config/next.response: Returns next_asset_id, next_sequence with gap filling

POST /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/intake-wi.response: Creates asset with auto-generated warehouse_asset_id and history entry

DELETE /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/unassig.response: Deletes asset, returns freed_id, logs to history

GET /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/id-history.response: Returns full history with events array
Lists all ID histories with pagination and filtering

GET /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/unassigned.response: Lists unassigned assets with search and type filter
